title: Document Registry Entry
description: Minimal external schema for a document registry JSONL entry. Describes a governed document and its authority, freshness, and relationships. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

path.description: Relative path to the document from project root.

doc_type.description: Document type: root_context, ai_onboarding, phase_boundary, governance_pack, stage_summit, runtime, schema, ledger, tracker, architecture.

status.description: Document status: current, accepted, closed, deferred, deprecated, archived.

authority.description: Authority level: source_of_truth, current_status, supporting_evidence, historical.

phase.description: Phase associated with the document, or null.

supersedes.description: doc_id of a document this one supersedes.

superseded_by.description: doc_id of a document that supersedes this one.

last_verified.description: ISO date of last verification check.

stale_after_days.description: Days after which the document is considered stale if not updated.
